# roleType

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

CRUD operations for RoleType records via app CLI

## Usage

```bash
app role-type list
app role-type get --id <value>
app role-type create --name <value>
app role-type update --id <value> [--name <value>]
app role-type delete --id <value>
```

## Examples

### List all roleType records

```bash
app role-type list
```

### Create a roleType

```bash
app role-type create --name "value"
```

### Get a roleType by id

```bash
app role-type get --id <value>
```
